name: faq-icons
title: Faq Icons
description: An FAQ accordion with a per-question icon from a fixed allowlist, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: FAQ accordion with a lucide icon beside each question.

sampleContent.title: Frequently asked questions
sampleContent.description: Quick answers, grouped by the part of the product you are asking about.

items.question: What are your support hours?
items.answer: Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST, and weekends from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: Subscriptions are charged to your default payment method on the same day each cycle; manage everything from the billing dashboard.

items.question: Do you offer localized support?
items.answer: We offer multilingual support in English, Spanish, French, German, and Japanese during regional business hours.
